title: Senior Python Developer
description: Looking for a seasoned Python developer with 7+ years of experience building scalable backend systems. Must have expertise in Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and AWS. Experience with machine learning frameworks like TensorFlow and scikit-learn is a plus. Should have led at least one engineering team and mentored junior developers.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We need a versatile Full Stack Developer with 3-5 years of experience. Required skills: React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Docker, CI/CD pipelines. Should be comfortable working in agile teams and have good communication skills.

title: Data Scientist
description: Seeking a Data Scientist with 5+ years in machine learning and data analysis. Must have hands-on experience with Python, SQL, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, and Tableau. Experience with big data tools like Spark and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP) preferred. Strong statistical knowledge required.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Looking for DevOps expertise with 4+ years in infrastructure automation. Skills needed: Kubernetes, Docker, Jenkins, Terraform, AWS, CI/CD pipelines. Experience with monitoring tools like Prometheus and ELK stack.
